'''''Droids'' 7''' is the seventh issue of the [[Star Wars: Droids (1986)|''Star Wars Droids'']] series of comics. It was published [[January 13]], [[1987]]<ref name="Marvel Age" /> with a cover date of [[April]] 1987.

==Plot summary==
{{Plot|comic}}
